questionHtml:
What is the number of atoms of oxygen in 2.0 mol of hydrated sodium carbonate, Na2CO3•10H2O? Avogadro’s constant, L or NA: 6.02 × 1023 mol–1

A.     6

B.     26

C.     3.6 × 1024

D.     1.6 × 1025

meta.title: What is the number of atoms of oxygen in 2.0 mol of hydrated sodium carbonate, Na2CO3•10H2O? Avogadro’s constant, L or NA: 6.02 × 1023 mol–1 A. 6 B. 26 C. 3.6 × 1024 D. 1.6 × 1025
